policy_name: NOXH Apartment C Clean DXF Geometry Policy

wall_reference_policy.external_reference_note: NOXH_Apartment_C_clean should export external walls on the drawn apartment outer shell unless QA proves a different wall reference convention is needed.

geometry_priority_note: Seeded for the Apartment C production run from room labels in NOXH_Apartment_C_clean.dxf. The single-block gate is disabled for first import output generation, matching the Apartment B production setup.
